reasoning: Shantanu is Matua, yes, and now he sits in Delhi as a minister—this is good for our people. But good for our people in Delhi is not the same as good for my hand in Gopalnagar. My Khadya Sathi card works today because of Didi's schemes, my wife went to the hospital and paid nothing. Five years of CAA and only fourteen certificates—this does not tell me the promise is real yet. Shantanu's celebration does not stop NRC if the Centre decides to come. Didi still says no NRC in Bengal, and her rice comes to my ration shop every month. I will not gamble my children's food for a minister's speech.
primary_drivers: Khadya Sathi and Swasthya Sathi cards are real, working today under Didi
Only 14 CAA certificates in 5 years—the BJP promise still feels hollow compared to my monthly rice
NRC fear remains—Didi's promise of no NRC in Bengal is more real to me than Shantanu's power in Delhi
